sharePopover.confirmPublishDescription: Once published, anyone on the internet with the link can view this timeline. People added to the editor list can edit it collaboratively.
sharePopover.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please copy the link manually.
sharePopover.editorHint: You have permission to edit this document.
sharePopover.heading: Shared timeline
sharePopover.loginToPublishHint: Log in to publish and share timelines.
sharePopover.notSharedHint: This timeline is not shared and is only visible on this device
sharePopover.publishedHint: This timeline is published; anyone with the link can read it
sharePopover.requestSubmitted: Request submitted, waiting for the author's approval
sharePopover.viewerAlreadyEditorHint: Already an editor of this timeline? Log in to start editing.
sharePopover.viewerCreateCopyHint: You can only view this timeline. To edit it, create a copy and edit that instead.
sharePopover.viewerRequestOrCopyHint: You can only view this timeline. To edit it, request edit access from the author or create a copy and edit that instead.

sharePopoverAuthor.allowEditRequestsHelp: When enabled, others can request to become editors of this timeline
sharePopoverAuthor.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please copy the link manually.
